insights.content: Saturn-Neptune at 0° Aries exactly on Sun/Moon midpoint (0.04° orb) — something core to identity surfacing at the most public point in the zodiac. Structure and dissolution arriving together. The Sabian (woman risen from the sea) perfectly captures the emergence theme.

SA Venus opposing natal Mars (0.09°) — love/beauty confronting the exalted creative engine. Venus says 'for whom?' and Mars has no answer yet. SA Venus simultaneously trining Jupiter (0.22°) — the faith center supports the softening. This is the central direction of the year.

Uranus on Moon/Venus midpoint (0.03°) at the MC — the emotional-romantic axis being rewired in public/career. Sabian: a woman past her change of life experiences new love. Love arriving through recognition, not biology.

SA Mercury conjunct MC at 29° Taurus (0.31°) — the directed mind arriving at career culmination at the anaretic degree. Urgency to articulate. Sabian: peacock parading before its admiring mate. Earned mastery shown to someone who sees.

SA Pluto = Saturn/Uranus midpoint (0.02°) — the deepest transformation happening silently: the old negotiation between structure and revolution being rebuilt from the root. The compromise that held for years is dissolving.

Jupiter absent from tight natal midpoint pictures — the final dispositor receives all depositor chains but isn't in the wiring. Jupiter is what the wiring SERVES, not part of the mechanism. The destination, not the road.
